text: Build in public sneak peek. 169 point grid (13 by 13) on a 5 mile radius. For one plumber client it surfaced 4 ranking dead zones their single point report had hidden for 2 years. The map pack is not one rank. It is a topology. #buildinpublic #LocalSEO #SaaS

Building Loca Track in the open. If you do local SEO professionally, what is one feature you wish existed in a rank tracker that nobody is shipping? Not asking for a wishlist, asking what is genuinely missing. #LocalSEO #SaaS
